$draftId..write: auth.token.admin == true || (!data.exists() && auth != null && newData.child('id').val() == $draftId && newData.child('creator_uid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('participants').child(auth.uid).exists())

$pickNumber..write: auth.token.admin == true || (auth != null && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('participants').child(auth.uid).exists() && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('started').val() == true && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('finished').val() != true && !data.exists() && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('current_pick_number').val() == $pickNumber + 0 && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('turns').child($pickNumber).val() == auth.uid)

started..write: auth.token.admin == true || (auth != null && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('creator_uid').val() == auth.uid && data.val() != true && newData.val() == true)

finished..write: auth.token.admin == true || (auth != null && data.val() != true && newData.val() == true && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('started').val() == true && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('turns').child(root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('current_pick_number').val() + '').val() == auth.uid && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('current_pick_number').val() == root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('total_players').val())

current_pick_number..write: auth.token.admin == true || (auth != null && ((root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('creator_uid').val() == auth.uid && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('started').val() != true && data.val() == 0 && newData.val() == 1) || (root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('started').val() == true && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('state').child('finished').val() != true && root.child('drafts').child($draftId).child('turns').child(data.val() + '').val() == auth.uid && newData.val() == data.val() + 1 && newData.parent().parent().child('draft_picks').child(data.val() + '').exists())))
